summary: All 5 new features tested and PASSED. 100% client-side AutoML Dashboard working correctly. Features tested: (1) Dark Mode Toggle, (2) Data Explorer tab with histograms/correlation heatmap/scatter plots, (3) Batch Predictions from CSV, (4) Model Export/Import buttons, (5) Export PDF button.

issues: AnimatePresence warning: 'You're attempting to animate multiple children within AnimatePresence' - minor animation warning, no functional impact
validateDOMNesting warning: div cannot appear as a descendant of p (Badge component) - minor HTML structure issue

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new features implemented correctly in App.js
Dark mode: Uses localStorage for persistence, toggles 'dark' class on html element (lines 780-792)
Data Explorer: Renders histograms with Recharts BarChart, correlation heatmap as table, scatter plot with correlation coefficient (lines 2114-2200)
Batch Predictions: handleBatchPredict parses CSV, runs predictions, displays results table with Download CSV option (lines 1015-1055)
Model Export/Import: handleImportModel for JSON file import, download button uses blob URL (lines 1058-1075)
Export PDF: handleExportPDF uses jsPDF with autotable plugin to generate training report (lines 1076-1150)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used sample dataset: Loan Approval (20 rows: age, income, credit_score, loan_amount, approved)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features verified working. Key data-testids: 'dark-mode-toggle' (sun/moon icon in header), 'explore-view' (Data Explorer), 'explore-histogram-col' (histogram selector), 'explore-correlation-heatmap', 'explore-scatter', 'explore-var-x', 'explore-var-y', 'predict-tab-batch' (Batch tab), 'batch-csv-textarea', 'run-batch-predict-btn', 'batch-results-table', 'download-batch-csv-btn', 'import-model-btn', 'import-model-input', 'export-pdf-btn'. Model Library shows trained models with view/download/delete icons in Actions column. Dark mode persists in localStorage under 'automl_dark_mode' key.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All 5 new features working correctly
